# Project 1 — Fracture X-Ray Analysis

## Overview
This project applies classical computer vision techniques to fracture X-ray scans
using OpenCV and Python. It forms part of a medical radiological AI learning pipeline,
focusing on image preprocessing and structure detection.

## Disease
**Fracture** — a break in bone continuity visible as irregular dark lines
across bright bone tissue on X-ray imaging.

## Techniques Used
- Grayscale conversion
- Binary thresholding
- Morphological operations (opening & closing)
- Canny edge detection
- Contour detection and drawing

## Project Structure
